beats.full_text: The hidden cost of overthinking is not weakness. It is constant safety scanning.
beats.ssot_text: The hidden cost of overthinking is not weakness. It is constant safety scanning.

beats.speakable_text: The hidden cost of overthinking is not weakness. It is constant safety scanning.

beats.full_text: Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive: more checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.speakable_text: Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

beats.full_text: The mechanism is simple. Your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. That is why a better post gives the reader a body-level action, not a motivational slogan.
beats.ssot_text: The mechanism is simple: your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. That is why a better post gives the reader a body-level action, not a motivational slogan.

beats.speakable_text: The mechanism is simple. Your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. That is why a better post gives the reader a body-level action, not a motivational slogan.

beats.full_text: Try this. Write one fact, one fear. And one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
beats.ssot_text: Try this: write one fact, one fear, and one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.speakable_text: Try this. Write one fact, one fear. And one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Anxious thoughts are proposals, not instructions.
beats.ssot_text: Bookmark the pattern: signal, reset, next action. anxious thoughts are proposals, not instructions.
